prompt: I modified some types in openinference-core's trace-config module. Can you make sure the docs still match?

assertions.text: Agent scopes review to the trace-config module specifically, not the entire package
Agent reads actual trace-config source files (OITracer.ts, OISpan.ts, types.ts, or constants.ts)
Report references specific content from trace-config-and-masking.md and compares it against source
